rulings.Case Title: JOY ANDERSON VS. CITIAPARTMENTS, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Class Certification
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 1. PlaiNTIFFs JOY ANDERSON and NICOLAS HARR Motion For Class Certification GRANTED. Class is certified as described in 110 of Complaint. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: AN HO PENG VS. GREGORY A. POTTER
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Reconsideration
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT GREGORY POTTER's Motion For Reconsideration DENIED. No new facts, law or circumstances presented. Per Gregory Potter Declaration 3 and 7, Brian Tarpanian vacated the premises on September 1, 2013, i.e. 26 days before the hearing on Motion to Set Aside Default. Defendant also fails to explain how this "new" circumstance support his argument that Default was entered due to mistake, surprise or excusable neglect. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MF FUND II, LP A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. JUANA INES TELLO et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 10. DEFENDANT MARIA HERNANDEZ's MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND DENIED. No reasonable diligence after notice provided on 8/30/13; 9/11/2013; 9/18/2013 etc.; and no proposed response attached. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATIONSTAR MORTGAGE, LLC VS. SUSAN BRYAN LEFROIS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 11. DEFENDANT SUSAN LEFROIS' DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges unlawful detainer pursuant to CCP 1161a. Veracity of allegations are not properly challenged on demurer. The beginning date of the daily damages can be reasonably inferred from the allegations in FAC 7. Thomas Drohan of Legal Assistance to the Elderly is ordered (1) again to comply with SFRO 2.6B and C and Court Orders in future. See Nov. 5, 2013 order in this matter; April 4, 2013 in CUD-13-643869; May 15, 2013 Tentative Ruling in CUD-13-643780; and (2) file a substitution of attorney forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GRANITE RANCH OPPPORTUNITIES VS. MANUEL A. CABRERA et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 15. DEFENDANT MARIA ALVAREZ's HEARING ON CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GORDON L. BUTTERWORTH et al VS. STEVEN STUART et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, November 12, 2013, line 12. DEFENDANT STEVEN STUART's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently alleges an unlawful detainer under CCP 1161(2) and "3 Day Notice" is in compliance with SFRO 37.9(c). Challenging the veracity of allegations is not appropriate on demurrer. = (501/REQ)
